_publications._publicationTitle: Murine models of IDH-wild-type glioblastoma exhibit spatial segregation of tumor initiation and manifestation during evolution.

_contextSnippet: We consistently identified p-Erk+ cells, presented as either individual cells in the SVZ or small clusters in the SVZ-associated areas, in age-matched p53 R172H CKO and p53 ∆E5–6 CKO mice, but not in the SVZ of control mice
details: Successfully identified p-Erk+ cells in SVZ regions of mutant mice but not control mice, detecting activation of Ras-mediated Erk/MAPK signaling
